title: aphanamixis humilis
intro: Aphanamixis humilis, also known as the yellow myrobalan or yellow murraya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in various parts of Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia, for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant's medicinal properties include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds and skin conditions, providing health benefits such as relief from pain and inflammation, improved digestion, and boosted immune system. Aphanamixis humilis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, and its bark, leaves, and roots are often used in traditional medicine to create remedies for various health conditions.
